title: Booking Safety & Anti-Fraud
description: Use only JVTO's official channels; JVTO never asks for full card numbers, CVV, banking passwords, or OTP codes.
body:
# Overview

Book on the official JVTO website and pay only through JVTO's official payment
links and listed accounts. WhatsApp and email are for support only — they are
not booking or payment channels. JVTO never asks for your full card number, CVV,
online banking password, or one-time codes by chat or email. If an account
number, link, or contact looks different, pause and verify through an official
channel.

# Related Concepts

- [How to Book](/policies/booking-paths.md)

title: How to Book
description: JVTO accepts bookings only through the official website; WhatsApp and email are for support, not for booking.
body:
# Overview

JVTO accepts bookings only through the official JVTO website. Choose a package,
date, and number of travelers, review the price, accept the terms, and pay — the
booking is recorded under a valid JVTO Booking ID.

WhatsApp and email are for customer assistance only (questions about custom
routes, groups, or complex pick-up/drop-off). They do not create, confirm,
modify, cancel, or transfer a booking; every booking action is completed on the
website.

# Related Concepts

- [All tours](/tours/index.md)

title: Cancellation & Lifetime Package Credit
description: How JVTO handles cancellations — a 48-hour cut-off, Lifetime Package Credit for early full cancellations, and cash refunds only for partial passenger cancellations.
body:
# Overview

The binding terms are in the published Booking, Payment & Cancellation policy;
this is a summary — see that page for exact details. Bookings are made only on
the official JVTO website, and normally start with a 20% deposit.

# Full Cancellation (the whole booking)

- **48 hours or more before Day 1:** the confirmed package converts to
  **Lifetime Package Credit**. It never expires and keeps the same package, your
  original number of travelers, and your original confirmed package price.
  Package Credit is not cash and cannot be exchanged for cash; it cannot be
  split or moved to a different package, and it may be transferred once.
- **Less than 48 hours before Day 1 (or a no-show):** the booking is forfeited
  and no Package Credit is created.

# Partial Cancellation (some travelers drop, the tour continues)

Cancelled travelers receive a cash refund of their confirmed per-person price:
100% at 48 hours or more before Day 1, 50% within 48 hours, and 0% after Day 1.
At least two paying travelers must remain, otherwise it is treated as a full
cancellation.

# Flight Disruption & Force Majeure

- **Verified flight cancellation** (for example volcanic ash): the package can be
  reactivated once for a 50% Recovery Fee of the original confirmed package price.
- **Verified destination closure:** if the whole tour is impossible you may choose
  Lifetime Package Credit or a cash refund less any non-recoverable vendor cost;
  if only part is affected, JVTO offers an alternative route first, then a refund
  of the affected component.

# Related Concepts

- [3D2N Ijen, Bromo & Madakaripura tour](/tours/from-surabaya/ijen-bromo-madakaripura-3d2n.md)

title: Ijen Health Screening
description: A health certificate is mandatory for every guest before Kawah Ijen crater entry; JVTO coordinates the screening with licensed medical staff.
body:
# Overview

A health certificate is mandatory for every guest before crater access at
Kawah Ijen. The requirement is set by the East Java conservation authority
(BBKSDA) — Surat Edaran SE.1658/KSA.9/2024 is cited as the supporting
regulatory authority, and the public crater-ticket terms require a health
certificate from a doctor. JVTO coordinates this screening with licensed
medical staff, and the verified certificate is checked at the crater gate.

The certificate check has been in force at the gate since the site's
January 2024 reopening (reported by Kompas at the time), and screening
covers basic fitness measures such as blood pressure and oxygen
saturation.

Where a guest is advised not to hike, the group can continue while that
person sits out.

# Limitation

The Surat Edaran itself is an administrative circular and is not published
at a stable public URL; the publicly checkable statement of the requirement
is the BBKSDA ticket portal's crater-access terms (cited below, last
checked 2026-07-07 — a first automated read that day was reset and
succeeded on retry; recorded per source-health policy).

# Related Concepts

- [Kawah Ijen](/destinations/kawah-ijen.md)

# Citations

- https://tiket.bbksdajatim.org
- https://bbksdajatim.org
- https://surabaya.kompas.com/read/2024/01/05/135127978/kawah-ijen-kembali-dibuka-pengunjung-wajib-bawa-surat-sehat-dan-punya

title: Ijen Monthly Closure (Rijik Program)
description: Kawah Ijen closes to all visitors on the first Friday of each month for the Rijik ecosystem-cleaning program; JVTO schedules tours around it so guests are unaffected.
body:
# Overview

Tourism Nature Park (TWA) Kawah Ijen closes completely to all tourism and
mining activity on the **first Friday of every month** (00:00–23:59 WIB) for
the **Rijik** ecosystem-cleaning program, which has run since March 2019.

# What Happens

On the closure day the conservation authority (BBKSDA/BKSDA), SAR, and HPWKI
jointly remove an estimated 100–150 kg of waste from Paltuding up to the crater
rim and plant endemic Cemara Gunung (*Casuarina junghuhniana*) to stabilise the
trail slopes and limit erosion. The crater is not accessible to visitors that day.

# Booking Impact

JVTO schedules tours around the monthly closure, so an Ijen hike is never booked
on a Rijik day — guests booked through JVTO are not affected.

# Related Concepts

- [Kawah Ijen](/destinations/kawah-ijen.md)
- [Weather and Closures](/travel-guides/weather-and-closures.md)
- [HPWKI](/trust/partners/hpwki.md)

title: What's Included
description: JVTO tours are all-inclusive of transport, crew, entrance fees, water, and stated meals; flights, insurance, tips, and personal expenses are excluded.
body:
# Overview

Every JVTO package includes private transport, a dedicated driver and
guide(s), all entrance fees and permits, drinking water, full pick-up to
drop-off assistance, and meals as stated (at least breakfast). Bromo tours
add the private 4WD jeep; Ijen tours add gas masks and trekking poles plus
the mandatory pre-hike health-screening coordination; Bali-origin tours
add the ferry crossing.

Typical exclusions: flights, visas, travel insurance, tips, and personal
expenses. See the inclusions/exclusions page for the full list.

# Related Concepts

- [All tours](/tours/index.md)

title: ISIC Student Pricing
description: JVTO is an official ISIC provider offering student pricing on selected packages to verified ISIC cardholders.
body:
# Overview

JVTO is an official ISIC (International Student Identity Card) provider —
provider ID 259268, listed publicly on the ISIC website. Verified ISIC
cardholders can receive student pricing on selected packages.

# Related Concepts

- [All tours](/tours/index.md)

# Citations

- https://www.isic.org/discounts/?providerId=259268

title: Natural Phenomena Are Not Guaranteed
description: JVTO cannot guarantee weather-dependent sights such as sunrise or Ijen's blue fire; itineraries are planned to maximise the chance.
body:
# Overview

Weather-dependent sights — a clear sunrise, or Ijen's blue fire — cannot be
guaranteed, because cloud, weather, and volcanic gas are outside any
operator's control. JVTO plans timing and routes to maximise the chance of
good conditions, and may adjust timing or routing for safety.

# Related Concepts

- [Kawah Ijen](/destinations/kawah-ijen.md)

title: Payment & Deposit
description: A deposit secures the booking, with the balance due before the tour; exact amounts and deadlines are on the booking page.
body:
# Overview

A deposit (standard 20% of the booking value) secures a booking, with the
balance due before the tour starts; close-to-departure bookings may require
fuller payment. Exact amounts, accepted methods, and deadlines are shown at
checkout and on the booking information page.

Pay only through JVTO's official payment links and listed accounts.

# Related Concepts

- [Cancellation & Lifetime Package Credit](/policies/cancellation-travel-credit.md)

title: Police Escort for Large Groups
description: For large groups, JVTO can coordinate an official traffic-police escort on some road segments, subject to authority approval.
body:
# Overview

For large groups (typically around 18 or more travelers), JVTO can
coordinate an official traffic-police escort on certain road segments where
the relevant Traffic Police unit approves it. This is a coordination service
subject to authority approval, not a default inclusion. See the travel-guide
page for how it works and any group incentives.

# Related Concepts

- [Police-led operations](/trust/claims/police-led.md)
